templates.name: C. Implicit Variable Values - Interfaces
templates.author: sherwyn

templates.name: 10 - Implicit Variables Example with Interface Descriptions
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Apply configs to interfaces based on descriptions previously applied ##
## If pushing a new description, be aware that "contains" logic may need to change ##
## This is a simple example, but can use regex for more complicated and nuanced descriptions ##

#foreach ($interface in ${__interface})
#if ($interface.description.contains("vmnic")) 
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 100

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("PNP"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 200

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("3802"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode trunk
    switchport trunk allowed vlan  add 200,300,500

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("9115"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode trunk
    switchport trunk allowed vlan  add 400

#else
#end 
#end
templates.promotedTemplateContent:

## If pushing a new description, be aware that "contains" logic may need to change ##
## This is a simple example, but can use regex for more complicated and nuanced descriptions ##

#foreach ($interface in ${__interface})
#if ($interface.description.contains("vmnic")) 
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 100

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("PNP"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 200

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("3802"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode trunk
    switchport trunk allowed vlan  add 200,300,500

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("9115"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description $interface.description
    switchport mode trunk
    switchport trunk allowed vlan  add 400

#else
#end 
#end

templates.name: 05 - Basic For Each Loops with Interface Variables
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Configure Access Ports with For Each Loop - includes Interfaces as variables ##

#foreach($access_port in [${first-access-port}..${end-access-port}])
interface ${access_interface_type}1/0/$access_port
description Staff user port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#end

templates.name: 09 - Implicit Variables - Configure Access and Trunk Ports
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Apply configs to existing access and trunk ports using system variables, regardless of interface speed or device ##

#foreach ($interface in ${__interface})
#if ($interface.portName.contains("Bluetooth") || $interface.portName.contains("AppGig") || $interface.portName.contains("Port-channel") || $interface.portName.contains("GigabitEthernet0")) 
#elseif ($interface.interfaceType == "Physical" && $interface.portMode == "access")

interface $interface.portName
## switchport mode access --> this command would have already been run to designate the port as an access port ##
switchport voice vlan $VoiceVlan
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#elseif ($interface.interfaceType == "Physical" && $interface.portMode == "trunk" && $interface.portName.startsWith("Ten"))

interface $interface.portName
## switchport mode trunk --> this command would have already been run to designate the port as a trunk port ##
switchport trunk allowed vlan add 300,400,500

#elseif ($interface.interfaceType == "Physical" && $interface.portMode == "trunk" && $interface.portName.startsWith("Gig"))

interface $interface.portName
## switchport mode trunk --> this command would have already been run to designate the port as a trunk port ##
switchport trunk allowed vlan add 600,700

#elseif ($interface.interfaceType == "Physical" && $interface.portMode == "trunk")

interface $interface.portName
## switchport mode trunk --> this command would have already been run to designate the port as a trunk port ##
switchport trunk allowed vlan add 800,900


#else    
#end 
#end

#if ($interface.portName.contains("Bluetooth") || $interface.portName.contains("AppGig") || $interface.portName.contains("Port-channel") || $interface.portName.contains("GigabitEthernet0"))

#else

templates.name: 06 - Multiple For Each Loops - Trunk and Access Port Configs
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Configure range of trunk ports ##

#foreach($trunk_port in [${first-trunk-port}..${end-trunk-port}])
int ${trunk_interface_type}1/1/$trunk_port
description Uplink port
switchport mode trunk
switchport trunk allowed vlan 20,100,200,300,400

#end

## Configure range of access ports ##

#foreach($access_port in [${first-access-port}..${end-access-port}])
int ${access_interface_type}1/0/$access_port
description Staff user port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#end

description Staff user port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#end

templates.name: 08.5 - Bind To Source Variables
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Configure trunk ports using bind-to-source variable ##
## Choose specific trunk ports based on device  ##

#foreach($trunk_port in ${trunk_port})
interface $trunk_port
description Uplink port
switchport mode trunk
switchport trunk allowed vlan 20,100,200,300,400

#end


## Configure access ports using bind-to-source variable ##
## Choose specific access ports based on device  ##

#foreach($access_port in ${access_port})
interface $access_port
description Staff user port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#end

spanning-tree bpduguard enable

templates.name: 02 - If Then Else Statements - Model Trigger Templates
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## 9300-specific Model Configs ##

#set($MODEL_RESPONSE = $SWITCH_MODEL)
#if($MODEL_RESPONSE == "9300")

vlan 100
name Management

vlan 200
name Staff

interface Vlan100
description Management
ip address $VLAN_IP1 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan200
description Staff
ip address $VLAN_IP2 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface gig1/0/$access_port
description Staff port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

## 9400-specific Model Configs ##

#elseif($MODEL_RESPONSE == "9400")

vlan 300
name Cameras

vlan 400
name Guests

interface Vlan300
description Cameras
ip address $VLAN_IP1 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan400
description Guests
ip address $VLAN_IP2 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface gig1/0/$access_port
description Cameras port
switchport access vlan 300
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

## 3850-specific Model Configs ##

#elseif($MODEL_RESPONSE == "3850")

vlan 500
name Printers

vlan 600
name Contractors

interface Vlan500
description Printers
ip address $VLAN_IP1 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan600
description Contractors
ip address $VLAN_IP2 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface gig1/0/$access_port
description Printers  port
switchport access vlan 500
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#else
#end

## AAA Configs for all models ##

tacacs server ISE-01
 address ipv4 10.10.0.100
 key Cisco123
tacacs server ISE-02
 address ipv4 10.10.0.200
 key Cisco123

aaa group server tacacs+ TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
 server name ISE-01
 server name ISE-02

aaa authentication login default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local
aaa authentication enable default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP enable
aaa authorization exec default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa authorization commands 15 default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa accounting exec default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
username cisco privilege 15 secret Cisco123


## ACL Configs for all models ##

access-list 101 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 host 50.0.0.10
access-list 102 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 50.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 103 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 20.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 104 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any
access-list 105 permit tcp any any eq www
access-list 106 permit tcp any any eq telnet
access-list 107 permit tcp any any eq smtp
access-list 108 permit tcp any any eq pop3
access-list 109 permit tcp any any eq 21
access-list 110 permit tcp any any eq 20

templates.name: 08 - Bind To Source Variables
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Configure trunk ports using bind-to-source variable ##
## Choose specific trunk ports based on device  ##

#foreach($trunk_port in ${trunk_port})
interface $trunk_port
description Uplink port
switchport mode trunk
switchport trunk allowed vlan 20,100,200,300,400
#end



## Configure range of access ports ##

#foreach($access_port in [${first-access-port}..${end-access-port}])
interface ${access_interface_type}1/0/$access_port
description Staff user port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#end

templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:

#if ($PickInterfaces.contains($interface.portName))
interface "$interface.portName
description "AP" $interface.description"

#end

templates.name: 03 - If Then Else Statements - Yes No Trigger Templates
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Configure VLANs ##

#set($VLAN_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE = $RUN_VLAN_TEMPLATE)
#if($VLAN_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE == "Yes")

vlan 100
name Management

vlan 200
name Staff

#else
#end


## Configure SVIs and Interfaces ##

#set($INTERFACE_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE = $RUN_INTERFACE_TEMPLATE)
#if($INTERFACE_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE == "Yes")

interface Vlan100
description Management
ip address $Mgmt_VLAN_IP 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan200
description Staff
ip address $Staff_VLAN_IP 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface gig1/0/$access_port
description Staff port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#else
#end

## AAA Configs for all models ##

#set($AAA_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE = $RUN_AAA_TEMPLATE)
#if($AAA_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE == "Yes")

tacacs server ISE-01
 address ipv4 10.10.0.100
 key Cisco123
tacacs server ISE-02
 address ipv4 10.10.0.200
 key Cisco123

aaa group server tacacs+ TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
 server name ISE-01
 server name ISE-02

aaa authentication login default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local
aaa authentication enable default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP enable
aaa authorization exec default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa authorization commands 15 default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa accounting exec default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP

#else
#end
 

## ACL Configs for all models ##

#set($ACL_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE = $RUN_ACL_TEMPLATE)
#if($ACL_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE == "Yes")

access-list 101 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 host 50.0.0.10
access-list 102 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 50.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 103 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 20.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 104 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any
access-list 105 permit tcp any any eq www
access-list 106 permit tcp any any eq telnet
access-list 107 permit tcp any any eq smtp
access-list 108 permit tcp any any eq pop3
access-list 109 permit tcp any any eq 21
access-list 110 permit tcp any any eq 20
 
#else
#end

#end
 

## ACL Configs for all models ##

#set($ACL_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE = $RUN_ACL_TEMPLATE)
#if($ACL_TEMPLATE_RESPONSE == "Yes")

access-list 101 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 host 50.0.0.10
access-list 102 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 50.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 103 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 20.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 104 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any
access-list 105 permit tcp any any eq www
access-list 106 permit tcp any any eq telnet
access-list 107 permit tcp any any eq smtp
access-list 108 permit tcp any any eq pop3
access-list 109 permit tcp any any eq 21
access-list 110 permit tcp any any eq 20
 
#else
#end

templates.name: 11 - Implicit Variables Example - One-Two Punch
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Use Template 1 as a day-0 or day-n template to prepopulate description and access/trunk for new switch ##
## Use Template 2 as a day-n template to push configs based on description ##
## Can use interface range command, but be aware of 8 range limitation per command ##
## Can also use for-each loop for a long range consecutive ports ##

TEMPLATE #1 

interface range gi1/0/1-10,13,15,20-22
description Camera Interfaces
switchport mode access

interface range gi1/0/11-12,14,16-19
description Access Point Interfaces
switchport mode access

interface range TenGig1/1/3-4,Twenty1/1/1-2
description Uplink Ports
switchport mode trunk

TEMPLATE #2

#foreach ($interface in ${__interface})
#if ($interface.description.contains("Camera")) 
    interface $interface.portName
    description These are IP Camera Ports
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 100

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("Access Point"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description These are AP ports
    switchport mode access
    switchport access vlan 200

#elseif ($interface.description.contains("Uplink"))
    interface $interface.portName
    description This is the Uplink port
    switchport mode trunk
    switchport trunk allowed vlan add 200,300,500

#else
#end 
#end

templates.name: 15 - Implicit Variables - Last Input and Output
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
##Admin Up Ports that haven't been used since August 1
##Uses Epoch time w/ milliseconds - https://www.epochconverter.com/



## Shut ports that are admin up but no device connected since X date ##

#foreach ($interface in ${__interface})
#if ($interface.portName.contains("Bluetooth") || $interface.portName.contains("App") || $interface.portName.contains("GigabitEthernet0")) 
#elseif ($interface.interfaceType == "Physical" && $interface.status == "down"  && $interface.adminStatus == "UP" && $interface.lastOutput < 1754020800000)
interface $interface.portName
shut

#else    
#end 
#end

templates.name: 12 - Implicit Variables - Switch Model example
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Push configuration based on switch model using system variables ##
## No need to manually enter device model ##

#if($__device.series.contains("9300"))

vlan 100
name Management

vlan 200
name Staff

interface Vlan100
description Management
ip address $VLAN_IP1 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan200
description Staff
ip address $VLAN_IP2 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface gig1/0/$access_port
description Staff port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

## 9400-specific Model Configs ##

#elseif($__device.series.contains("9400"))

vlan 300
name Cameras

vlan 400
name Guests

interface Vlan300
description Cameras
ip address $VLAN_IP1 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan400
description Guests
ip address $VLAN_IP2 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface gig1/0/$access_port
description Cameras port
switchport access vlan 300
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

## 3850-specific Model Configs ##

#elseif($__device.series.contains("3850"))

vlan 500
name Printers

vlan 600
name Contractors

interface Vlan500
description Printers
ip address $VLAN_IP1 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan600
description Contractors
ip address $VLAN_IP2 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface gig1/0/$access_port
description Printers  port
switchport access vlan 500
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#else
#end

## AAA Configs for all models ##

tacacs server ISE-01
 address ipv4 10.10.0.100
 key Cisco123
tacacs server ISE-02
 address ipv4 10.10.0.200
 key Cisco123

aaa group server tacacs+ TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
 server name ISE-01
 server name ISE-02

aaa authentication login default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local
aaa authentication enable default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP enable
aaa authorization exec default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa authorization commands 15 default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa accounting exec default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
username cisco privilege 15 secret Cisco123
 

## ACL Configs for all models ##

access-list 101 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 host 50.0.0.10
access-list 102 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 50.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 103 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 20.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 104 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any
access-list 105 permit tcp any any eq www
access-list 106 permit tcp any any eq telnet
access-list 107 permit tcp any any eq smtp
access-list 108 permit tcp any any eq pop3
access-list 109 permit tcp any any eq 21
access-list 110 permit tcp any any eq 20

templates.name: 01 - Basic Variables
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Create VLANs ##

vlan 100
name Management

vlan 200
name Staff

vlan 300
name Data



## Configure SVIs and Interfaces ##

interface Vlan100
description ${Description}-SVI
ip address $Mgmt_VLAN_IP 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan200
description Staff
ip address $Staff_VLAN_IP 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan300
description Data
ip address $Data_VLAN_IP 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2


interface gig1/0/$access_port
description Staff port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root


## Configure AAA Settings ##

tacacs server ISE-01
 address ipv4 10.10.0.100
 key Cisco123
tacacs server ISE-02
 address ipv4 10.10.0.200
 key Cisco123

aaa group server tacacs+ TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
 server name ISE-01
 server name ISE-02

aaa authentication login default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local
aaa authentication enable default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP enable
aaa authorization exec default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa authorization commands 15 default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa accounting exec default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
username cisco privilege 15 secret Cisco123
 

## Configure Access Lists ##

access-list 101 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 host 50.0.0.10
access-list 102 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 50.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 103 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 20.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 104 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any
access-list 105 permit tcp any any eq www
access-list 106 permit tcp any any eq telnet
access-list 107 permit tcp any any eq smtp
access-list 108 permit tcp any any eq pop3
access-list 109 permit tcp any any eq 21
access-list 110 permit tcp any any eq 20

templateParams.instructionText: This is to configure the management IP

templates.name: B. Implicit Variable Values - Devices
templates.author: sherwyn

templates.name: 17 - EEM Script - CDP Rename - Overwrite Descriptions
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
event manager applet cdpplatformdesc
event neighbor-discovery interface regexp .* cdp add
action 1.0 cli command "enable"
action 2.0 cli command "config t"
action 3.0 cli command "interface $_nd_local_intf_name"
action 4.0 cli command "description $_nd_cdp_platform"
action 5.0 cli command "end"

event manager applet clearcdptable
event none maxrun 120
action 1.0 cli command "enable"
action 2.0 cli command "clear cdp table"
action 3.0 wait 60
action 4.0 cli command "enable"
action 5.0 cli command "config t"
action 6.0 cli command "no event manager applet cdpplatformdesc"
action 6.1 cli command "no event manager applet clearcdptable"
action 7.0 cli command "end"


#MODE_ENABLE
event manager run clearcdptable
#MODE_END_ENABLE

action 4.0 cli command "description $_nd_cdp_platform"
action 5.0 cli command "end"

action 6.0 cli command "no event manager applet cdpplatformdesc"
action 6.1 cli command "no event manager applet clearcdptable"
action 7.0 cli command "end"


#MODE_ENABLE
event manager run clearcdptable
#MODE_END_ENABLE

templates.name: 17.5 - EEM Script - CDP Rename - Append Description
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
event manager applet updateport
event neighbor-discovery interface regexp .* cdp add

action 1.0 cli command "enable"
action 2.0 cli command "show interface $_nd_local_intf_name | include ^[\ ]*[Dd]escription"
action 3.0 regexp "^[ ]*[Dd]escription:[ ]*(.*)" "$_cli_result" match current_desc
action 3.1 if $_regexp_result ne "1"
action 3.2 set current_desc "No Existing Description"
action 3.3 end
action 4.0 cli command "config t"
action 5.0 cli command "interface $_nd_local_intf_name"
action 6.0 cli command "description CDP - $_nd_cdp_platform. Desc - $current_desc"
action 7.0 cli command "end"


event manager applet clearcdptable
event none maxrun 120
action 1.0 cli command "enable"
action 2.0 cli command "clear cdp table"
action 3.0 wait 60
action 4.0 cli command "enable"
action 5.0 cli command "config t"
action 6.0 cli command "no event manager applet updateport"
action 6.1 cli command "no event manager applet clearcdptable"
action 7.0 cli command "end"


#MODE_ENABLE
event manager run clearcdptable
#MODE_END_ENABLE

action 6.0 cli command "no event manager applet updateport"
action 6.1 cli command "no event manager applet clearcdptable"
action 7.0 cli command "end"


#MODE_ENABLE
event manager run clearcdptable
#MODE_END_ENABLE

templates.name: 07 - Multiple For Each Loops With Stacks
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Configure range of trunk ports, including stack switch range ##
## FortyGig and Gig configured as interfaces ##
## Interfaces can also be made a variable if needed ##

#foreach($stack_number in [${first-stack-number}..${end-stack-number}])
#foreach($trunk_port in [${first-trunk-port}..${end-trunk-port}])

interface FortyGig${stack_number}/1/$trunk_port
description Uplink port
switchport mode trunk
switchport trunk allowed vlan 20,100,200,300,400

#end
#end

## Configure range of access ports, including stack switch range##


#foreach($stack_number in [${first-stack-number}..${end-stack-number}])
#foreach($access_port in [${first-access-port}..${end-access-port}])

interface TwoGig${stack_number}/0/$access_port
description Staff user port
switchport access vlan 200
switchport mode access
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root

#end
#end

templates.name: 16 - EEM Script - Bounce Uplink Port
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
##EEM script that allows bouncing of main uplink##

event manager applet REBOOT_INTERFACE
event none maxrun 120
action 1.0 cli command "enable"
action 2.0 cli command "configure terminal"
action 3.0 cli command "interface GigabitEthernet0/0"
action 3.1 cli command "shutdown"
action 3.2 cli command "interface Ten1/1/4"
action 3.3 cli command "shutdown"
action 4.0 syslog msg "Starting shutdown timer, waiting 10 seconds..."
action 4.1 wait 20
action 4.2 syslog msg "Ending shutdown timer after 10 seconds..."
action 5.0 cli command "interface GigabitEthernet0/0"
action 5.1 cli command "no shutdown"
action 5.2 cli command "interface Ten1/1/4"
action 5.3 cli command "no shutdown"
action 6.0 syslog msg "Starting no shut timer, waiting 20 seconds..."
action 6.1 wait 20
action 6.2 syslog msg "Ending no shut timer after 20 seconds..."
action 6.3 syslog msg "Wait completed successfully!"
action 7.0 cli command "end"

#MODE_ENABLE
event manager run REBOOT_INTERFACE
#MODE_END_ENABLE

##Deletes EEM script after it has finished running  ##
no event manager applet REBOOT_INTERFACE

templates.name: 13 - Implicit Variables Example with Switch Stacks
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Configure the first port in every switch in the stack to be an uplink port ##
## Can also make interface type into a variable as needed ##

#set( $StackPIDs = $__device.platformId.split(",") )
#set( $stack_member_count = $StackPIDs.size() )

#foreach($switch in [1..${stack_member_count}])
interface Ten${switch}/1/1
description Uplink port
switchport mode trunk
switchport trunk allowed vlan 20,100,200,300,400

#end

templates.name: 00 - Pure CLI
templates.author: sherwyn
templates.templateContent:
## Create VLANs ##
vlan 100
name Management

vlan 200
name Staff

vlan 300
name Voice

## Configure SVIs and Interfaces ##

interface Vlan100
description Management
ip address 192.168.10.10 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2

interface Vlan200
description Staff
ip address 192.168.20.10 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2


interface Vlan300
description Staff
ip address 192.168.30.10 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 192.168.10.1
ip helper-address 192.168.10.2


interface gig1/0/10
description Staff port
switchport mode access
switchport access vlan 200
switchport voice vlan 20
spanning-tree portfast
spanning-tree bpduguard enable
spanning-tree guard root


## Configure AAA Settings ##
tacacs server ISE-01
 address ipv4 10.10.0.100
 key Cisco123

tacacs server ISE-02
 address ipv4 10.10.0.200
 key Cisco123

aaa group server tacacs+ TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
 server name ISE-01
 server name ISE-02

aaa authentication login default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local
aaa authentication enable default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP enable
aaa authorization exec default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa authorization commands 15 default group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP local if-authenticated 
aaa accounting exec default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
aaa accounting commands 15 default start-stop group TACACS-SERVER-GROUP
username cisco privilege 15 secret Cisco123

## Configure Access Lists ##

access-list 101 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 host 50.0.0.10
access-list 102 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 50.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 103 permit ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 20.0.0.0 0.255.255.255
access-list 104 deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any
access-list 105 permit tcp any any eq www
access-list 106 permit tcp any any eq telnet
access-list 107 permit tcp any any eq smtp
access-list 108 permit tcp any any eq pop3
access-list 109 permit tcp any any eq 21
access-list 110 permit tcp any any eq 20
